content.title: Uday Varmora - DevOps / Cloud Engineer Resume
content.summary: DevOps / Cloud Engineer with **1+ year** building **CI/CD pipelines, Linux-based cloud-native infrastructure, and automated AWS environments** — cutting release cycles **82% (45 → 8 min)**, provisioning **80%**, and toil **70%** across 20+ services. Hands-on with **Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, Docker, Kubernetes (EKS), Terraform, Python, Bash, SQL, Node.js** in agile, remote-first SaaS environments.
skills: Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, ArgoCD
AWS — EKS, EC2, Lambda, S3, EBS, EFS, Glacier, AWS Storage Gateway, RDS, VPC, IAM, CloudWatch
Docker, Kubernetes (EKS), Helm, Karpenter, KEDA, Ingress-NGINX Controller
Terraform (34 modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking), AWS CloudFormation, AWS SAM
Python, Bash/Shell, SQL, JavaScript, Node.js, Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL), System Administration
Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, CloudWatch, ELK Stack, Datadog
HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, Sealed Secrets, Trivy Operator, IAM least-privilege, storage encryption, data at rest, data in transit
Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, Branching Strategies, SonarQube quality gates

bullets: Minimized operational toil by **~70%** through the development of automated **Python, Bash, and SQL scripts**, applying solid **software engineering principles** and **modular design** to handle log triage, cluster configurations, secret rotation, and CI/CD quality gates.

Provisioned multi-environment AWS infrastructure on **Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL)** using **Terraform IaC** (34 reusable modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking) — reducing provisioning time by **80%** and configuration drift by **95%** across Dev, Staging, and Production environments.

Designed and maintained **40+ CI/CD pipelines** using **Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, and AWS CodeBuild** — automating build-test-deploy workflows across **20+ Dockerised microservices**, cutting release cycles by **82% (45 min → under 8 min)** with zero manual intervention.

Operated **Kubernetes (EKS)** clusters with **ArgoCD GitOps, Helm, and Ingress-NGINX Controller** — managing zero-downtime rollouts, Karpenter node autoscaling, and KEDA event-driven scaling; sustained **99.9% uptime** across multi-AZ clusters.

Strengthened security posture with **HashiCorp Vault** and **AWS Secrets Manager** for centralized secret management, ensuring **storage encryption for data at rest and data in transit**; enforced least-privilege IAM via IRSA and Pod Identity.

Monitored and maintained multiple complex **AWS environments** on **Linux architectures**, utilizing **CloudWatch** and **Prometheus** to troubleshoot complex technical and functional application issues with minimal downtime.

Wrote **Python and Bash** automation scripts to streamline deployment workflows and reduce manual operational steps — demonstrated ownership and impact, earning **full-time promotion within 5 months**.

projects.title: Cloud-Native SaaS CRM Platform — Multi-Tenant AWS / EKS Build & Deploy Infrastructure
projects.tech: Terraform · AWS EKS · Docker · Jenkins · GitLab CI/CD · GitHub Actions · AWS CodePipeline · ArgoCD · Ingress-NGINX · Prometheus · Grafana
bullets: Designed multi-environment build/deploy architecture with per-environment **VPC isolation and S3/DynamoDB remote state** — enabling reproducible Dev/Production infrastructure on Linux-based EKS nodes with **Ingress-NGINX Controller**; executed zero-downtime **EKS cluster upgrade (v1.33 → v1.34)** managing node group rollouts, add-on compatibility, and API deprecation remediation.

Reduced compute costs by **30% ($500+/month)** via Karpenter Spot/On-Demand diversification and KEDA off-hours scale-down; migrated deprecated loki-stack to Loki + Grafana Alloy, eliminating deprecated chart dependencies and improving log pipeline reliability.

Built multi-region **disaster recovery strategy** using Velero (with EBS snapshot Data Mover), S3/ECR cross-region replication, and AWS Backup with cross-region vaults — achieving **RPO < 1 hour** for production workloads.

projects.title: Serverless Backend — Multi-Tenant Salon Management SaaS
projects.tech: AWS Lambda · SAM · CloudFormation · API Gateway · RDS PostgreSQL · Amazon EFS · Secrets Manager · Python
bullets: Architected a serverless deployment platform on AWS, managing secure data environments using **RDS, S3, and EFS** with robust **storage encryption for data at rest and data in transit** — enabling independent deployment of **30+ Python Lambda functions** with reproducible packaging and per-function least-privilege IAM.
Solved Lambda layer size constraints by engineering a shared **EFS-mounted Python dependency layer** across 30+ functions — eliminating packaging bottlenecks and cutting build times by **60%+**.

projects.title: Healthcare Management System — Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD
projects.tech: AWS S3 · CloudFront · App Runner · ECR · Docker · GitHub Actions · Secrets Manager · IAM
bullets: Engineered split-hosting (S3/CloudFront frontend, Dockerised App Runner backend) with a **dual-registry GHCR/ECR strategy** — enabling zero-downtime redeployments and **~30% reduced image pull latency** while serving 500+ concurrent users.

Automated full release workflow via **GitHub Actions** — Docker build, ECR/GHCR dual-push, S3 sync, CloudFront invalidation, and App Runner deploy; applied least-privilege IAM scoping that removed 5+ overly permissive roles.

education.left: **B.Tech, Information Technology** — Dharmsinh Desai University, Gujarat, India  |  CGPA: 7.25 / 10

achievements: Awarded **“Student of the Year”** in Class 10 for outstanding academic performance and leadership contributions.

jd:
About Akmazo Capital
Akmazo focuses on SaaS software companies that have the potential to lead a specific market. Our target investment is an enterprise SaaS business that has achieved a customer and revenue scale of 100 and $10M, respectively. We offer an active advisor model and partner with management teams to help accelerate growth, refine product positioning, scale technology platforms, and build market-leading businesses. We are a multi-disciplinary group of software executives with strong strategic and operational experience across numerous stories. We have a combined 150 years of leading software growth companies across many sectors.



The team looks for companies that are addressing large markets and management teams that want a partner to help grow and build category-defining products. The firm's data-driven approach is based on prior experiences building exceptional value at both public and private companies. Akmazo aims to be a majority investor and is therefore comfortable with liquidity solutions for existing investors and management teams as part of transactions.

Job Description
Function: IT Operations and Support → DevOps / Cloud

CI / CDCloud ComputingConfiguration ManagementContainers+9 moreLinuxMonitoringPythonAWSDockerKubernetesPuppetShell ScriptingTerraform
Responsibilities:

Monitoring and maintaining multiple AWS environments.
Writing Infrastructure as code.
Troubleshooting technical or functional issues in a complex AWS environment to provide timely resolution with various applications and platforms.
Managing several streams of work concurrently.
Optimising and helping improve existing workflows.


Requirements:

Experience in Linux administration and troubleshooting (3 years).
Experience with SQL and databases (2 years).
Automation scripting experience with a few of the following: Terraform, JavaScript, Puppet, SQL, Bash, Python, Ruby, Makefiles (2 years).
Experience with designing and deploying AWS Services like Elastic Compute (EC2), Storage (S3 EBS, EFS, Glacier, and AWS Storage Gateway), and RDS (1 year).
Bachelor's in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent experience.
2+ years of programming experience in a scripting language such as Python, JavaScript, or Ruby.
AWS experience, strong understanding of fundamentals.
Strong Linux experience (3+ years).
Solid understanding of Software Engineering and Computer Science principles (Be able to explain how you've used principles outlined here).
Desires to minimise toil where possible through automation.


Nice to Have:

Experience in AWS storage encryption, data at rest, and data in transit (1 year).
Experience with open-source web services environments (HTTP, Nginx, Apache HTTPD) (2 years).
Experience building and deploying microservice-based applications in the cloud with Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CI / CD) tools and processes (1 year).
An understanding of container technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes.
Understanding of cloud provisioning tools such as Terraform and Jamf.
Understanding of internet security and data privacy best practices in highly regulated industries.
